belier.intro: The Moon moves into Capricorn today at nearly 96 percent illumination, lighting your tenth house of career and public reputation just two days before the Full Moon. Saturn and Neptune both continue retrograde in your own sign, keeping the work of self-definition serious and ongoing. The Leo Sun in your fifth house adds warmth and confidence to what could otherwise feel like a demanding week.
belier.love: A partner sees you taking your public commitments seriously today, and that steadiness reassures them more than words could. Let your actions speak for the relationship.
belier.work: Career visibility grows sharply as the Moon approaches fullness in your tenth house. A long-term professional ambition deserves a concrete next step now, not just more planning.
belier.energy: Your fire finds a productive outlet in ambition today rather than restlessness. Channel ego and drive into a single visible achievement.
belier.intuition: A sense of who you are meant to become publicly is sharpening as the Full Moon approaches. Trust the direction that feels most authentic, not most impressive.
belier.mantra: I let my ambition reflect who I truly am.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: Capricorn holds the Moon today at nearly full strength, lighting your ninth house of belief and broader perspective. Saturn and Neptune continue their joint retrograde in your twelfth house, deepening private reflection on rest and release. The Leo Sun in your fourth house keeps home steady as your outlook widens.
taureau.love: A conversation about long-term values or life direction with a partner carries real weight today. This is a good day to discuss where you both see things going.
taureau.work: A plan involving further education, travel, or a broader professional perspective gains real traction as the Moon nears fullness. Trust the pull toward something larger.
taureau.energy: Your earth element benefits from combining rest with genuine reflection today. A walk with no destination often reveals more than a planned agenda would.
taureau.intuition: A belief about what you deserve in terms of rest and support is becoming clearer under this joint retrograde. Trust that you are allowed to need what you need.
taureau.mantra: I widen my view of what I am allowed to need.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The nearly full Moon in Capricorn moves through your eighth house today, bringing serious focus to trust, intimacy, and shared resources. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your eleventh house, testing which communities deserve your long-term investment. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps your voice active even amid deeper undercurrents.
gemeaux.love: Vulnerability about a fear you rarely share deepens a bond significantly today. The nearly full Moon favors honesty over your usual deflecting humor.
gemeaux.work: A financial partnership or shared resource arrangement needs serious, structured attention now, especially as the Full Moon approaches its peak. Address any lingering ambiguity directly.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy turns inward and serious today rather than scattering across many topics. Give one important matter your full attention.
gemeaux.intuition: A truth about someone's real commitment to a shared resource or bond is becoming difficult to avoid. Trust the clarity, even if it complicates things.
gemeaux.mantra: I let honesty deepen what deserves to last.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: Capricorn, your opposite sign, holds the nearly full Moon today in your seventh house of partnership, a mirror position that always asks for honest self-reflection. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your tenth house, keeping your career direction under serious review. The Leo Sun in your second house grounds your sense of personal worth.
cancer.love: A relationship holds up a clear mirror today, showing you something about your own needs that is easier to see in someone else's eyes. Receive it without defensiveness.
cancer.work: A career decision benefits from the steady, serious energy of this lunar phase. Structure your next move around what actually lasts, not what looks good immediately.
cancer.energy: Your water element meets a firmer, more structured counterpart today in Capricorn's influence. Let this discipline serve your usual sensitivity rather than fighting it.
cancer.intuition: A partner's honest reflection of you carries real information today, even if the delivery feels blunt. Trust the substance over the tone.
cancer.mantra: I receive honest reflection as a gift, not a threat.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The nearly full Moon in Capricorn moves through your sixth house today, bringing serious focus to health and daily service just before the Full Moon peaks. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your ninth house, testing the practical soundness of your beliefs. Your own Sun keeps your confidence steady through this more demanding, grounded stretch.
lion.love: Practical care for a partner, attention to their daily needs rather than grand gestures, means more than usual today. Show love through consistency.
lion.work: A health routine or daily work habit needs real structural correction now, not another postponement. The Moon's approach to fullness favors decisive change.
lion.energy: Your fire wants discipline today rather than spectacle. Direct your natural intensity into consistent, unglamorous daily effort.
lion.intuition: A belief about your own limitations, tested by Saturn's retrograde, is proving less true than you assumed. Trust the evidence of your actual daily capability.
lion.mantra: I trust consistent effort over dramatic gestures.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: Capricorn holds the nearly full Moon today in your fifth house, bringing serious, structured energy to creativity and joy just before the Full Moon peaks. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your eighth house, deepening honest reckoning with intimacy and trust. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house keeps quiet processing active beneath the surface.
vierge.love: A creative or playful gesture toward a partner carries more emotional weight than usual today. Let yourself be less serious in this one area, even as other matters stay heavy.
vierge.work: A creative project benefits from disciplined structure now rather than more open exploration. Give your ideas the deadline and framework they need to become real.
vierge.energy: Your earth element finds productive expression through structured creative work today. A project with clear boundaries serves you better than an open-ended one.
vierge.intuition: A quiet realization about what genuine trust requires from you, present since Saturn's station, deserves to be acted on rather than merely noted.
vierge.mantra: I give my creativity the structure it needs to last.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The nearly full Moon in Capricorn lights your fourth house today, bringing serious attention to home and family foundations. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your seventh house, keeping a key partnership under honest, structural review. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendships steady through this more introspective stretch.
balance.love: A partnership benefits from addressing a practical, structural question, living arrangements, shared responsibilities, rather than avoiding it. The nearly full Moon favors resolution.
balance.work: Domestic responsibilities or a home-based project need serious attention now, even if it competes with your professional calendar. Give it real priority today.
balance.energy: Your air element grounds through tending your home space today. A tidied environment supports the more serious conversations ahead as the Full Moon nears.
balance.intuition: A pattern in how your family history shapes your approach to partnership becomes clearer today. Notice it without judgment.
balance.mantra: I let my foundations support my closest bonds.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: Capricorn holds the nearly full Moon today in your third house, sharpening communication and short-range planning as the Full Moon approaches. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your sixth house, bringing structural seriousness to your daily habits. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps your reputation visible and steady.
scorpion.love: A direct, structured conversation with a partner about daily logistics proves more useful today than an emotional one. Practical honesty serves the relationship well.
scorpion.work: Written communication, contracts, or scheduling matters benefit from disciplined attention now. Precision matters more than speed as the Full Moon nears.
scorpion.energy: Your water runs deep but channels well into structured daily tasks today. Let routine carry some of the intensity you usually hold internally.
scorpion.intuition: A habit you have been slow to change becomes genuinely urgent to address as the Full Moon approaches. Trust the timing of this realization.
scorpion.mantra: I address what needs changing before it demands more.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon leaves your own sign and enters Capricorn today at nearly full strength, moving into your second house of resources and self-worth. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your fifth house, asking for real structure around your creative and romantic life. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps your natural optimism alive through this more grounded stretch.
sagittaire.love: A conversation about practical needs, shared expenses, or long-term security with a partner proves surprisingly productive today. Let structure serve the relationship rather than threaten its spontaneity.
sagittaire.work: A financial matter or a question of fair compensation deserves direct attention now. The nearly full Moon favors clarity over your usual optimistic assumption that things will work out.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire meets Capricorn's grounding influence today, channeling naturally into practical, resource-focused action rather than pure inspiration.
sagittaire.intuition: A sense of your own worth, separate from your usual confidence, is coming into sharper focus. Trust the quieter, more grounded version of this knowing.
sagittaire.mantra: I know my worth beyond my usual optimism.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today, growing toward fullness at nearly 96 percent in your first house of identity and direct action. Saturn, your ruling planet, continues retrograde alongside Neptune in your fourth house, keeping ancestral and domestic themes in serious focus. The Leo Sun in your eighth house asks for real honesty in your closest bonds.
capricorne.love: You feel more like yourself in a relationship today, and that groundedness invites deeper trust from a partner. Let your natural steadiness be seen rather than hidden behind duty.
capricorne.work: Personal ambition gains real clarity and momentum as the Moon in your own sign approaches fullness. This is a strong day to commit publicly to a serious goal.
capricorne.energy: Your earth element feels unusually potent today, the Moon amplifying your natural authority and endurance. Use this well-earned strength deliberately.
capricorne.intuition: A sense of your own identity, separate from family expectation, is becoming unusually clear as the Full Moon approaches. Trust this emerging clarity fully.
capricorne.mantra: I stand fully in who I am, apart from expectation.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The nearly full Moon in Capricorn moves into your twelfth house today, a quiet, reflective placement just before your own Full Moon arrives. Pluto retrograde continues transforming your sense of personal power from within your own sign. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your third house keep communication serious and deliberate. The Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key partnership visible.
verseau.love: A quiet, private conversation with a partner today carries more weight than a public one would. Save the important words for a moment of real privacy.
verseau.work: Behind-the-scenes preparation serves you better than visible action today. Use this quieter placement to ready yourself for what the coming Full Moon in your own sign will illuminate.
verseau.energy: Your air element benefits from rest and reflection today, an unusual but necessary pause before your own sign's Full Moon arrives.
verseau.intuition: A sense of what the coming Full Moon will reveal about your own identity is already forming. Trust the quiet preview your intuition is offering.
verseau.mantra: I prepare quietly for the clarity that is coming.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The nearly full Moon in Capricorn moves through your eleventh house today, bringing serious focus to community and long-term goals. Neptune, your ruling planet, continues retrograde alongside Saturn in your first house, deepening the ongoing redefinition of your identity. The Leo Sun in your sixth house keeps daily practice steady.
poissons.love: A friendship or community connection reveals something important about what you actually need from close relationships today. Let this insight inform how you show up with a partner.
poissons.work: A long-term goal involving a group or shared vision benefits from serious commitment now rather than passive hope. Structure your part in it clearly.
poissons.energy: Your water element finds unusual clarity through group connection today rather than solitary withdrawal. Let shared purpose carry some of your usual sensitivity.
poissons.intuition: Neptune and Saturn together continue reshaping who you are becoming, and today a community connection reflects this transformation back to you unexpectedly clearly.
poissons.mantra: I let my community reflect who I am becoming.
poissons.author: Sibylle
